This team usually wants to end games by turn 3
so is faros just whacking shit with strike then
faros is there for the draw

You want to draw the extra strike wheel on turn 1 or 2 and put it on lotan. Then when you have strikes in hand see whether or not you can stall until your faros can use pious if she can't, then just frenzy and lotan
Pious on Jenkins is better if you don't expect faros to survive and you need Jenkins after your team dies
Or if you can't get faros exalt fast enough
Cause then you can lotan and do all your shit then Jenkins and finish off low hp enemies
Mulligan any non draw and non lotan strike cards away
You need the draw and the extra strike in deck wheel early
By turn 3 or 4, the enemy should either be crippled beyond repair or you finish setting up an otk with lotan into jenkins
One thing that's good about this deck is that it's fast to win or lose so you can farm acorns fast
